title: Otsuka Reports Long-Term Kidney Data for Voxzact
headline: Otsuka released long-term kidney disease data for Voxzact, supporting FDA approval bid.
key_facts: Long-term kidney data reported; timing tied to full FDA approval strategy

title: Roche's Divarasib Beats Rivals in Head-to-Head Phase 3 NSCLC
headline: Roche's KRAS G12C inhibitor divarasib demonstrated statistically significant superiority on PFS and OS versus rival KRAS inhibitors in Phase 3 non-small cell lung cancer trial.
key_facts: Phase 3 head-to-head study; primary endpoint PFS and key secondary endpoint OS both met; exact numerical values deferred to medical meeting; competitor KRAS inhibitors studied

title: Abivax Surges on $920M Raise and Obefazimod Safety Data
headline: Abivax stock rose up to 10.16% after upsized $920M capital raise and Phase 3 data showing obefazimod cancer risk (1.09–1.37 per 100 patient-years) matches UC background rates.
key_facts: $920M raise (upsized from $800M); 6,400,000 ADSs at $125.00/ADS; greenshoe exercise $120M; NMSC rates 1.09 per 100 patient-years (25 mg) and 1.37 per 100 patient-years (50 mg); stock up 7.94%–10.16%; Phase 3 ABTECT Part 2 data

title: AstraZeneca Partners CSPC in $1.7B Kidney Disease Deal
headline: AstraZeneca signed a deal worth up to $1.7 billion with Chinese partner CSPC Pharmaceutical for a kidney disease asset, marking the second collaboration between the two companies.
key_facts: Deal value up to $1.7 billion; kidney disease indication; second AstraZeneca-CSPC partnership; first was obesity-related

title: Scribe Therapeutics Files for IPO
headline: Gene-editing company Scribe Therapeutics filed for IPO, testing market appetite for earlier-stage CRISPR biotechs in a strong 2026 IPO environment.
key_facts: IPO filing announced July 2, 2026; CRISPR/gene-editing platform; 2026 biotech IPO class includes five of six largest offerings since 2022; H1 2026 biotech deals totaled $134 billion

title: Oruka Therapeutics Falls After $300M Insider Sale
headline: Oruka Therapeutics shares declined after-hours on July 1 following a $300 million block sale by major shareholder Fairmount Healthcare Fund II at $84.43/share.
key_facts: Fairmount Healthcare Fund II sold 3,553,410 shares at $84.43/share on July 1, 2026; total value $300,014,406; stock later recovered to $93.29

title: Colorado Court Halts Enbrel Price Cap
headline: Court blocked Colorado's state price cap on Amgen's Enbrel (etanercept), delivering a legal win for the drug manufacturer on pricing regulation.
key_facts: Colorado price cap halted by court; Enbrel (etanercept) affected; regulatory/legal win for Amgen

title: Galderma Receives CRL for Anti-Wrinkle Drug
headline: FDA issued a Complete Response Letter rejecting Galderma's anti-wrinkle drug application.
key_facts: Complete Response Letter (CRL) issued; anti-wrinkle/cosmetic indication; FDA rejection

title: Sarepta DMD Drugs FDA Decision Pending
headline: Sarepta Therapeutics awaits FDA decision on ductal muscular dystrophy (DMD) drugs.
key_facts: FDA decision date tracked; DMD indication; regulatory milestone pending

title: BridgeBio Secures Up to $1B from Sixth Street, KKR
headline: BridgeBio raised up to $1 billion from Sixth Street and KKR to support three drug launches.
key_facts: Up to $1 billion investment; Sixth Street and KKR participants; funds support three drug launches

title: Ipsen Acquires Memo Therapeutics in ~$800M Deal
headline: Ipsen acquired Memo Therapeutics in a potential $800 million deal for a kidney infection drug, adding to Ipsen's $2.55 billion deal spree.
key_facts: Deal value ~$800 million; Memo Therapeutics acquisition; kidney infection indication; Ipsen cumulative deal commitments $2.55 billion in spree

title: FDA Gene/Cell Therapy Regulator Steps Down
headline: Vijay Kumar, top FDA gene and cell therapy regulator, is stepping down; Karim Mikhail assumes acting CBER Director role with expanded oversight.
key_facts: Vijay Kumar exiting CBER leadership; Karim Mikhail assuming acting CBER Director; gene/cell therapy regulatory leadership change

title: Orca Bio's Tregzi Approved; $428K WAC
headline: Orca Bio's Tregzi, a novel regulatory T cell therapy for blood cancer transplant patients, received FDA approval on July 1 with a WAC of $428,000.
key_facts: Tregzi approved July 1, 2026; regulatory T cell therapy; indication: blood cancer transplant patients; WAC $428,000

title: Eli Lilly Foundayo Approved; $149–$50/Month Pricing
headline: Eli Lilly's Foundayo (orforglipron) approved April 1, 2026, priced at $149/month base dose, with Medicare Part D enrollees eligible for $50/month copay starting July 1, 2026.
key_facts: Foundayo (orforglipron) approved April 1, 2026; base WAC $149/month; Medicare Part D copay reduced to $50/month effective July 1, 2026; oral GLP-1 agonist

title: Revolution Medicines Shares KRAS Drug Combination Data
headline: Revolution Medicines released promising data on a KRAS drug combination, adding to competitive KRAS-mutant oncology market momentum.
key_facts: KRAS drug combination data; promising topline; reported ~7 hours before Roche divarasib news; part of KRAS market competitive cluster
